faqSection.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faqSection.lede: Still have questions? Call us directly at 053 861 7608.
faqSection.q1: Which areas of Saudi Arabia do you serve?
faqSection.a1: We are based in Jeddah and serve projects across the Western Region, with capability to mobilize equipment and crews nationwide depending on project scope.
faqSection.q2: Do you provide operators with rented equipment?
faqSection.a2: Yes. All equipment rentals can include certified, experienced operators, or be supplied as dry-hire for clients with their own qualified staff.
faqSection.q3: How quickly can equipment be mobilized to site?
faqSection.a3: Standard mobilization is typically 24–48 hours depending on equipment type and site location, with expedited options available for urgent requirements.
faqSection.q4: What are your rental terms — daily, weekly, monthly?
faqSection.a4: We offer flexible daily, weekly and monthly rental terms, with discounted rates for long-term project commitments. Contact us for a custom quote.
faqSection.q5: Do you offer emergency or urgent equipment requests?
faqSection.a5: Yes, our team is available around the clock to coordinate urgent equipment and manpower needs whenever possible.
